contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.subtitle: If you have any questions, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Droppin Delivery. These Terms of Service govern your use of our delivery services, platform, and related features. By using our service, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using Droppin services, you agree to be bound by this agreement. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: Droppin provides last-mile delivery services connecting shops, drivers, and customers across Egypt.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You must provide accurate account details, protect your credentials, and remain responsible for activity under your account.

sections.title: 4. Service Usage
sections.content: You agree to lawful use only. Misuse, unauthorized access attempts, and harmful activities are strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Payment Terms
sections.content: Service fees are applied according to the active pricing model. Late or unresolved balances may affect service access.

sections.title: 6. Delivery Terms
sections.content: Delivery windows are estimates. External conditions such as traffic or force majeure may affect timing.

sections.title: 7. Liability and Insurance
sections.content: Liability is limited according to declared package value and applicable coverage policies.

sections.title: 8. Privacy and Data Protection
sections.content: We process personal data according to our privacy policy and applicable legal requirements.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate access according to policy. Outstanding obligations remain enforceable.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by Egyptian law, and disputes are handled under Egyptian jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Droppin Delivery, we protect your personal data and process it responsibly. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it, and your related rights.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, including account and contact details needed to deliver the service.

sections.title: 2. Automatically Collected Information
sections.content: We may collect device, usage, and operational data to secure and improve platform performance.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use information to operate deliveries, provide support, process transactions, and improve service quality.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.content: Information may be shared with essential service providers and operational parties where required for fulfillment.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.content: We use technical and organizational safeguards to protect data confidentiality and integrity.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: Data is retained only as necessary for service operation, legal obligations, and legitimate business purposes.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of eligible personal data according to applicable law.

sections.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: Cookies are used for functionality, analytics, and user experience improvements.

sections.title: 9. Third-Party Services
sections.content: Our platform may link to third-party services that are governed by their own privacy policies.

sections.title: 10. Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy and will reflect changes with an updated date and notice when material.

privacyContact.title: Contact Us About Privacy
privacyContact.subtitle: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us via:
privacyContact.officerText: You can send privacy inquiries directly to droppin.eg@gmail.com.
